raw_consumer_statement:
I am submitting this complaint regarding unauthorized charges from the merchant XXXX XXXX XXXX that continued after I properly cancelled my membership. Despite providing Citi with evidence of my cancellation, Citi has sided with the merchant and has not reversed the charges. 

Details : I cancelled my membership with XXXX XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year>, and I have attached a PDF copy of my cancellation receipt as proof. 

The merchants own email correspondence confirmed my cancellation and explicitly stated they would not dispute a chargeback. I am attaching this email as evidence. 

Despite this, Citi processed charges of ~ {$600.00} on XX/XX/year>, and XX/XX/year>. 

I initially filed a dispute with Citi ( Case # XXXX ) and provided all supporting documentation. Citi ruled in favor of the merchant, disregarding the evidence I submitted. 

Requested Resolution : I request that the CFPB review my complaint and assist in : Ensuring Citi credits my account for the XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX charges. 

Ensuring Citi properly reviews disputes when strong evidence of cancellation and merchant acknowledgment exists. 

Attachments : Cancellation receipt PDF Merchant email confirming cancellation Previous dispute correspondence with Citi Thank you for your attention to this matter. I appreciate your assistance in ensuring fair treatment under federal consumer protection guidelines.
